title: RIAARIO 1:18 All Terrain RC Car, 36 KPH High Speed Remote Control Car with 2.4 GHz Remote Control, 4WD Electric Vehicle Off-Road Truck, 4X4 Waterproof RC Trucks with 2 Rechargeable Batteries
features: The RC truck has a powerful Super 380 motor that runs at 20,000 rpm per minute and delivers an exciting top speed of 36 km/h. Its improved drivetrain ensures smoother operation and offers the operator an unprecedented level of driving pleasure. In addition, it has a 3-wire servo, which provides higher torque and effectively reduces the turning load of the front wheel compared to a 5-wire servo.

Enjoy a longer playing time with 2 x 7.4 V 1300 mAh high-performance batteries that provide up to 40 minutes of fun. The IPX4 electronic speed controller has overheating and over-current protection for safe gaming, and you can adjust the speed via the TH.TRIM button on the 2.4GHz anti-interference controller. The speed of the vehicle can be controlled proportionally to the real vehicle and it has a 10 minute automatic shut-off to save power.

Conquer any terrain with 4 strong, oversized non-slip rubber wheels that are soft, elastic and durable. The uneven texture of the tyres provides excellent friction and forms the basis for emergency braking of the vehicle.

Experience the latest remote controlled car technology with the 1:18 scale monster truck from RIAARIO. The full short course truck body includes a full driver and co-pilot cockpit, and the improved parts include 7 LED lights, a thicker nylon chassis and aggressive bumpers front and rear for improved handling on race tracks, trails, muddy courses, skate parks etc. more. In addition, the hobby RC car has another wheelie bar that can be mounted for extra driving fun.

Enjoy reliable, stable and high speed in extreme bashing with two fully enclosed differential gears. The dust and waterproof effect is in best condition and the main shaft with large metal gear can withstand enormous torques. Thanks to the adjustable shock absorbers, the RC monster truck easily masters difficult terrain, whether on the road or off-road.

RIAARIO is committed to developing more professional racing models for customers to choose from, and is happy to receive suggestions about our products. To better protect the rights and interests of our customers, we provide a 90-day warranty on our RC cars for children. Contact our customer service team in time if you have any problems with the car, and we will definitely provide you with a satisfactory solution. ​
description: Product Description Adjustable Metal Shocks Independent suspension design keeps high-speed RC truck ready for all-terrain, as you are blasting around mud, sand, or yard for maximum fun and high-speed thrills. Adjustable spring shocks enable themselves to increase or decrease the friction or traction for the demands of desired traction and suspension travels. Proportional Turning Angel Control The multi-function remote control is supplied with 3 control modes: Speed adjustment, steering angle adjustment and steering fine-tuning. At the same time, it also includes 2 reverse buttons to meet different needs and operation habits. 150+ meters long-distance control, 0.1s quick reaction makes the operation faster and smoother. 4 Headlights & 3 Front Bright Lights The cool car shell and simulated driving cabin coupled with 7 unique LED lights allow you to enjoy a realistic driving experience and the passion brought by speed. Plus with the aggressive front and rear bumper effectively protect this truck against collisions and bumps, there is no limit to chase and seek for fun. 380 Powerful Motor The aggressive 380 motor delivers exciting mod-motor power output with long-lasting performance. Grab a fistful of throttle and this motor delivers massive torque to wheelie on command. RC race truck puts you in the driver’s seat for high-flying off-road action. Metal Gear Shaft and Differential The front and back differential which is purpose-built to rip full-throttle through the turns and the main shaft with large metal gear withstand huge torque, have been chosen for reliability, stability and fast speed during extreme bashing. Splash Waterproof ESC IPX4 splash waterproof electronic speed controller is versatile for multiple protections which many other rc cars do not possess. This off-road race truck not only features overheat and over-current protection, but also embodies anti-blocked protection that minimizes risks of burnt motors. Moreover, Low battery voltage cutoff is introduced to this hobby rc car to prevent over-discharged battery packs. Safe Rechargeable Batteries With 2* 7.4V 1300mAh high-capacity batteries, this toy vehicle's play time is extended to 40 minutes. And the low battery voltage cutoff function avoids battery's overcharge, ensures the safety while enjoying the fun of driving. Larger Rubber Tires 4 strong oversize anti-skid tough Rubber Wheels which are soft, elastic, and durable, give the 1/18 scale fast remote control car effective traction for bashing on almost any terrain. Body Shell with Full Cockpit Driver and Copilot Body Shell with full cockpit driver and copilot included adopt durable ABS material and flawless spray paint, enhances the maneuverability of this truck and animates authentic driving experience. Package List: 1* RC Car 1* Controller 2* Batteries 1* Screwdriver 1* USB Cable 1* User Manual 1* Packing Box 1* Small Cross Wrench 4* Extra Body Clips Specification: Size: 10.9*7.7*4.7 in Drive System: 4WD Frequency: 2.4Ghz Charging Time: about 2.5h (5V 2/3A charger) Control Distance: 150m Running Time: 2*20mins Car Battery: 2*7.4V 1300Mah Control Battery: 3* 1.5V AA battery (not included) Note: Fully charged the battery before driving Take out the battery in both controller and car if not driving for a long time Tear all the warning paper off before driving Do not touch the motor after driving when it gets hot
